payload: Step 1: Refactor MiroFish export.ts — generalize graphToMiroFishSeed() to accept agent_source (label for agent nodes) and context_from (array of labels for context nodes) config, defaulting to current Person/Organization/Location behavior. Task: task-1774087436-6476
Step 1 complete: MiroFish export.ts generalized with MiroFishExportConfig (agent_source, context_from). Commit 2e4d7bf. Typecheck passes. Backward compat preserved.
Step 1 MiroFish export generalization verified. Types pass, backward compat preserved, clean implementation.
Step 1 review passed. Advancing to Step 2: agents.ts — parallel agent dispatch per stage config. Task task-1774087440-dbf9 ready. 3 blocked API route tasks follow after.

Step 2: Create webapp/src/lib/engine/agents.ts — AgentDispatcher with dispatchAgents() that groups OrchestratorTasks by stage kind, creates StageRunners via createStageRunner(), builds scoped StageContexts, runs all via Promise.allSettled, returns AgentResult[]. Types: AgentHandle (id, task ref, stage kind, status), AgentResult (task_id, status completed|failed, stage_result or error). Optional onProgress callback. Task task-1774087440-dbf9.

Step 2 complete: agents.ts created (commit 6b398d8). Exports dispatchAgents(), AgentHandle, AgentResult. Maps task types to StageKind, builds scoped contexts, runs via Promise.allSettled. Typecheck passes.

Step 2 agents.ts: parallel dispatch bridges OrchestratorTask to StageRunner correctly. Types clean, casoSlug propagated, abstraction layer used, Promise.allSettled for concurrency. No blocking issues.
